title: Super Ninja Cockroach Traps for Indoors – 12 Pack, Cockroach Control for Indoor Infestation, Safe & Toxin-Free Trap with Food Attractant, Nature-Friendly Pest Solution for Home, Garage & Shed
bullet_points: Kills Cockroaches Fast, Where They Hide: Super Ninja cockroach traps are engineered with a potent food-based attractant embedded in ultra-sticky glue, drawing in cockroaches from kitchens, bathrooms, garages, and other hotspots—delivering powerful results within days.

Toxin-Free & Safe for Indoor Use: Designed for peace of mind, these roach traps contain no toxic chemicals or strong odours. Perfect for use in homes with children, pets, or sensitive individuals—safe, silent, and stress-free infestation protection

Up to 3 Months of Continuous Protection: This super strong cockroach killer remains active for weeks, offering uninterrupted defense from cockroach invasions. Whether used behind appliances or under sinks, they keep quietly capturing pests until full—no need for constant monitoring.

Effortless Setup, No Mess or Fuss: Simply unfold, peel off the protective strip, and place the glue trap in areas where roaches are seen. No sprays, no batteries, and no complicated assembly—just a discreet and reliable solution for every room.

Eco-Conscious, Fully Recycled Design: Crafted from recycled paper and responsibly packaged, these traps combine pest control with sustainability. After use, dispose of them with your normal waste, helping to protect your home and the planet.
